FAQ

Got Questions?

Everything you need to know about Disco Dealz.

How do I order a service?
+
Join our Discord server and open a support ticket or DM us directly. We'll discuss your requirements and get started right away!
How fast are orders completed?
+
Nitro/Boost delivery is usually instant. Discord setups take 1–6 hours. Custom logos & thumbnails may take up to 48 hours.
Are the Discord Nitro & Boost deals legit?
+
100% legitimate. All Nitro, Boosts, and decorations are real and delivered safely. 200+ happy customers in our first month prove it!
How long have you been operating?
+
We launched on April 10, 2026. In just 1 month we've done 50+ Discord setups and sold 200+ Discord items. Growing fast!
Do you offer refunds?
+
We strive for 100% satisfaction. If there's an issue, contact us on Discord immediately and we'll resolve it transparently.
Can I request custom services not listed?
+
Absolutely! Join our Discord and tell us what you need. We handle many custom requests at fair prices.
